specs.title: homepage loads
homepage exposes a single h1
/about loads
/privacy loads
/terms loads
gated paths redirect to /sign-in when unauthenticated
/check-in redirects to /sign-in when unauthenticated
/notifications redirects to /sign-in when unauthenticated
seed patient OTP flow lands on /dashboard
wrong OTP shows inline error
email is preserved when toggling OTP <-> Magic Link tab
SUPER_ADMIN OTP flow lands on /dashboard on admin app
PATIENT-only email is rejected by admin gate
admin-role token signs in on patient app then bridges to admin URL
sign-out clears session and redirects to /sign-in or marketing
cold sign-in lands on /onboarding for fresh email
